title: Energy Solutions
description: Our electrical engineering division has experts in a range of fields. We offer services in the areas of power generation, transmission, distribution, specialist electrical installations, safety and security installations, automation and telecommunications.

data.description:
Our electrical engineering division has experts in a range of fields. We offer services in the areas of power generation, transmission, distribution, specialist electrical installations, safety and security installations, automation and telecommunications.


This division has also gained experience in cross-border projects between Angola and Namibia, supplying electricity to a broad spectrum of end users. It works together with our mechanical and civil divisions in order to offer the client a one-stop solution to any infrastructure project implementation.

In addition, we offer our clients a range of renewable energy solutions for new and also for existing infrastructure to ensure the effective use and stewardship of their energy resource.

  • We provide engineering related expertise in the following areas:
  • Oil, gas and coal generation
  • Electrical distribution
  • Electrical transmission
  • Substations
  • Specialist electronic services
  • Energy audits
  • Renewable energy solutions
  • Electricity licensing & tari¬ff analysis
  • IPP solutions
  • Hydro-electricity
  • Solar thermal generation
